text: What up, Reece?
Reece, congrats on being named All That cast member of the week.
Really? That's a real thing?
Yeah, and I got you a gift.
I know how much you love the band Super M, so here.
- A Super M mug. - Aw, thanks Ryan!
I got you a gift too. A grapefruit autographed by Super M.
Whoa!
This is the only citrus fruit I need to complete my Super M citrus fruit collection.
- Can you put this in my display case? - Yeah, sure.
That's nothing, I got you Baekhyun's favorite work out shirt.
It's full of his actual sweat.
Oh, that's Baekhyun's smell, right? This is amazing!
And that's not all, I also got you Taeyong's wallet.
Whoa!
There's like 500 bucks in here!
Yeah, yeah. All this Super M stuff is cute, but I got you... Super M!
Hey!
- Whoa! - Hey guys.
Congrats on being named the All That cast member of the week.
Wow!
- Yeah... - Hey, is that my shirt?
What?
Is that my wallet?
Where did you get it?
Uh, definitely not your tour bus when you were taking a nap, no.
Hey, while you guys are here, would you mind performing a song? For me?
- Can you give us a second? - OK.
- Let's talk about this, guys. - Guys, guys...
That's not cool. That's my favorite wallet.
My mom gave it to me!
Bro, calm down, my mom is gonna get you a new one, OK?
They steal my favorite shirt!
- It's just a shirt. - Just a shirt?
- Hey, hey! - Guys, we can't fight here.
Guys, listen, listen. I think Reece is a big fan.
We can't let our fans down. Let's do it for her.
OK, we'll do it.
- OK, let's go! - Yay!
Yeah, come on!
Let's give a round of sound for tonight's musical guest, Super M!
